title: Domain
description: A distinct problem class with its own objectives, constraints, evaluation criteria, and failure modes.

objective_types.description: Objective type identifiers supported in this domain.

constraint_types.description: Constraint category identifiers applicable in this domain.

evaluators.description: Evaluator identifiers configured for this domain.

known_failure_modes.description: Known failure mode identifiers for this domain.

promotion_thresholds.description: Promotion threshold identifiers configured for this domain.
